label: San Lorenzo Cathedral Bell Tower
description: The images feature the iconic stone bell tower of the San Lorenzo Cathedral overlooking the town of Lugano and its lake. They capture a classic panorama including the surrounding mountains and the local funicular tracks.
search_prompt: stone bell tower with a green dome overlooking a lake and town with mountains

label: San Lorenzo Cathedral Interior
description: The ornate high altar and frescoed apse of the Cattedrale di San Lorenzo, a landmark Roman Catholic cathedral in Lugano.
search_prompt: ornate church interior with baroque high altar and frescoed vaulted ceilings

label: Altar of San Rocco Church
description: An ornate Baroque altar within the Church of San Rocco in Lugano, featuring a central religious painting flanked by marble columns and statues under a frescoed dome.
search_prompt: ornate Baroque church altar with marble columns and central religious painting under a frescoed dome

label: St. Lawrence Cathedral ceiling
description: The ornate, frescoed vaulted ceilings of the Cattedrale di San Lorenzo in Lugano, featuring distinctive red star patterns and ecclesiastical heraldry.
search_prompt: frescoed vaulted church ceiling with red stars and sunburst motifs

label: San Lorenzo Cathedral Interior
description: A marble statue of a seated religious figure positioned in front of a tall, vertical stained-glass window featuring an archangel and the coat of arms of Lugano.
search_prompt: seated marble bishop statue in front of a tall narrow stained-glass window with an archangel in a church interior

label: Religious altarpieces in a church
description: Ornate side altars and religious oil paintings framed in marble, located inside a historic church in Lugano near Parco Ciani.
search_prompt: ornate church side altar with a religious oil painting and decorative marble architecture

label: Cathedral Pipe Organ and Frescoes
description: A grand pipe organ situated above a church portal, featuring an ornate balcony, a rose window, and elaborate frescoed vaulting.
search_prompt: large pipe organ in a cathedral with frescoed ceilings and a circular stained glass window

label: Villa Ciani architectural reliefs
description: Intricate stone carvings and decorative reliefs featuring mythological figures, masks, and foliage found on the facade of Villa Ciani. These architectural details showcase ornate historical craftsmanship within the park.
search_prompt: ornate stone relief carvings of mythological figures and masks on a historical building facade

label: Catholic clergy in liturgical vestments
description: A collection of photos showing Catholic priests, bishops, and religious figures wearing ceremonial white and cream robes during a religious event in Lugano. The group is gathered outdoors, with some images featuring the San Lorenzo Cathedral in the background.
search_prompt: group of people wearing white Catholic liturgical vestments and chasubles standing in a church courtyard or public square

label: Lugano Cathedral choir performances
description: These images depict choral groups performing inside the ornate interior of the Cattedrale di San Lorenzo in Lugano, including promotional posters for its sacred music concerts.
search_prompt: a choir group singing inside a cathedral with a large baroque altarpiece and religious statues

label: Frescoes of San Rocco Church
description: A series of fragmented medieval and Renaissance mural paintings located inside the Church of San Rocco in Lugano, depicting religious figures and historical donor inscriptions.
search_prompt: medieval religious fresco wall fragments with saints, halos, and latin text

label: Lugano Old Town Streets
description: These images capture the characteristic narrow cobblestone streets and colorful Mediterranean-style buildings found in the historic center of Lugano. The views highlight the iconic sloped pedestrian paths, traditional architecture, and storefronts typical of the city's old town.
search_prompt: narrow cobblestone street in Lugano historic center with yellow and orange buildings on a slope

label: Saint Joseph mosaic fountain
description: A rustic stone fountain in Parco Ciani featuring a stylized mosaic of Saint Joseph holding the infant Jesus, set against a curved stone wall.
search_prompt: stone water fountain with a rectangular basin and a mosaic of a saint on a curved stone wall
